Open source offers full transparency and prevents built-in backdoors

Informasjon til deg som er tillitsvalgt i Pensjonistforbundet Takk for den gode jobben du gjør!

Vi er nå litt over tre aktive måneder inn i 2025, og kan ta en velfortjent pust i bakken. Jeg vil gjerne takke hver især for den viktig og gode jobben dere gjør, rundt om i hele landet.Pensjonistforbundet jobber for aldersvennlige lokalsamfunn, der alle kan leve gode liv. Vi lager sosiale møteplasser for å motvirke ensomhet. Vi jobber politisk, for å sikre økonomisk trygghet og velferd for alle, og helsetjenester når vi trenger det. Pluss mye mer.

La det ikke være noen tvil: Sammen gjør vi samfunnet bedre! Og når vi tar fatt igjen etter påskedagene, må vi jobbe videre for å invitere flere inn i fellesskapet vårt, slik at vi får enda bedre uttelling for den gode jobben vi gjør. Det er vårt felles mål.Med ønske om en god påske,Jan Davidsenforbundsleder
Tips til aktivitet: Bocciaturnering for ung og gammel!
Pensjonistforbundet Hemsedal inviterer unge og gamle til bocciaturnering hver 2. mandag i måneden. Boccia er en sport for alle, uansett alder eller erfaring, og denne aktiviteten skaper engasjement!🎉

All the reactions to DeSantis' presidential kickoff catastrophe,"Tina Turner's style was simply the best. ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ ͏ ‌ By Liza Hearon Thursday, May 25 THE JOKES ARE FLYING AFTER DESANTIS KICKOFF CATASTROPHE Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis formally announced that he is seeking the 2024 GOP presidential nomination on Twitter on Wednesday night after a 26-minute delay due to technical difficulties. ""That's unfortunate,"" Elon Musk said as Twitter struggled. President Joe Biden tweeted a dig: ""This link works."" [HuffPost] TRUMP GOES SCORCHED EARTH Donald Trump welcomed DeSantis to the presidential race with a series of increasingly bizarre posts on his social media channels. One video featured Hitler and the devil and another post boasted about Trump's ""bigger"" ""Red Button."" [HuffPost]BIDEN: 'STAGGERING' 650 MASS SHOOTINGS SINCE UVALDE Biden marked one year since the massacre at a school in Uvalde, Texas, by again calling on lawmakers to pass long-awaited gun safety measures. “How many more parents will live their worst nightmare before we stand up to the gun lobby?” Biden said. [HuffPost]LEGENDARY SINGER TINA TURNER DIES AT 83 Tina Turner, the dynamic rock and R&B icon whose career spanned decades, died Wednesday. Here are memorable moments from her life in photos, 10 indispensable pieces of life and career advice, and a look at her style, which was, of course, simply the best. [HuffPost] What to know before taking boric acid, TikTok's latest yeast infection remedy. The nine biggest signs of autism in adulthood. This leading cause of death for new moms may surprise you. The newest dairy product is real milk, but it's made without the cow. Love the smell of fresh cut grass? We've got some truly horrifying news for you. Yes really — here's how many of us are relying on the pull-out method. Get the latest coronavirus updates on our dedicated page JAN. 6 RIOTER WHO PUT FOOT ON PELOSI'S DESK GETS PRISON Richard “Bigo” Barnett, the Arkansas man who became famous for propping his foot on a desk in then-House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s office during the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection, was sentenced to 54 months in prison. The judge said Barnett had “not shown any acceptance of responsibility.” [HuffPost]MCCARTHY TROLLS DEMS FOR NOT LIFTING DEBT CEILING EARLIER Democrats could have lifted the debt ceiling while they still controlled both the House and Senate, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy (R-Calif.) said, but they declined to do it for no good reason. He's not wrong. And now Republicans have taken the debt ceiling hostage over spending cuts. [HuffPost]TARGET SLAMMED FOR REMOVING PRIDE MERCH Target says it pulled some of its Pride Month merchandise from shelves to protect employees but critics say the company has merely bowed to pressure from anti-LGBTQ conservatives. ""CEO of Target Brian Cornell selling out the LGBTQ+ community to extremists is a real profile in courage,"" California Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) tweeted. [HuffPost]TEEN DIES DURING APPARENT SOCIAL MEDIA STUNT ON BRIDGE A 17-year-old boy fell to his death this weekend while climbing a Los Angeles bridge in an apparent social media stunt, police said. The teen slipped and fell ""when climbing one of the arches"" at the 6th Street Viaduct. [AP]TYPHOON MAWAR LEAVES 'MAJOR MESS' BEHIND IN GUAM Many residents of Guam remained without power and utilities Thursday after Typhoon Mawar tore through the remote U.S. Pacific territory the night before and ripped roofs off homes, flipped vehicles and shredded trees. There were no immediate reports of deaths and injuries. [AP] The 100 hardest video-game levels of all time. What the 2020 census can — and can't — tell us about LGBTQ people. ""There is never a reason to take off your socks"": a flight attendant's 12 etiquette rules. Trans people are avoiding whole U.S. states to stay safe. Why are Americans so obsessed with ice? Companies are finding it’s not so simple to leave Russia. Others are quietly staying put. Here are the coolest one-of-a-kind Father's Day gifts you can get on Etsy. Target put out some cool Pride gear — then pulled it once the bigots came for them. Bill Lee, jazz musician who scored early films of son Spike Lee, dead at 94. Taylor Swift's Ice Spice collaboration raises eyebrows. Whoopi Goldberg delivers scathing reality check for right-wing ""snowflakes."" Gavin Newsom uses Marjorie Taylor Greene’s theories against her in wicked burn. Fox News clearly enjoyed Ron DeSantis’ glitchy campaign launch on Twitter. These are the best anti-theft bags to carry while traveling, according to reviewers. People want Cardi B to adopt them after seeing her daughter's epic school lunches. This image received thousands of racist comments. Here's why I made it. ""Selling Sunset"" star Bre Tiesi says she’s like a ""guinea pig"" when it comes to plastic surgery. What your hairstylist knows about you with just one look... it's a lot more than you think! Does somebody keep forwarding you this newsletter? — Subscribe here! ©2023 HuffPost BuzzFeed, Inc, 111 E 18th St, 13th Floor, New York, NY 10003 You are receiving this email because you signed up for updates from HuffPost. Feedback | Privacy Policy | Unsubscribe",1,1
